basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Associate Project Engineer, Assistant Project Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Associate Project Engineer, Assistant Project Engineer, Sr. Project Technician
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Associate Project Engineer, Assistant Project Engineer, and Sr. Project Technician posts! Published on the official website https://www.iitg.ac.in, this new recruitment drive offers 3 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants with a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, B.Sc., or Diploma in Engineering with relevant experience can apply via online interview on 28 May 2026. Find all details about the IIT Guwahati Project Engineer and Technician vacancy 2026, including eligibility

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering, B.Sc. or Diploma in Engineering with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Associate Project Engineer: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering (preferably in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or related disciplines). Candidates with a Bachelor's degree must have a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience. Strong foundation in probability, linear algebra, optimization techniques, and programming (Python), along with a sound understanding of machine learning methods and their application to analytical and modeling problems. Assistant Project Engineer: Bachelor's in Engineering (preferably in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or equivalent disciplines). Strong foundation in mathematics, and programming (Python), along with an understanding of machine learning methods and their applications. Experience in full-stack application development (web and mobile), including backend APIs and frontend frameworks. Hands-on experience in model deployment (e.g., REST APIs, containerization) and integration with GIS platforms and smartphone-based applications/sensors. Sr. Project Technician: B.Sc. OR Diploma in Engineering with a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in system hardware and infrastructure management. Experience in setup, configuration, and maintenance of system hardware, data and compute servers, and storage infrastructure. Familiarity with data management practices, backup systems, and basic data security protocols. Working knowledge of Linux-based systems and networking will be an advantage.

selection_process: Online interview Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati recruitment is 28 May 2026. Candidates are advised to attend the walk-in interview on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the IIT Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Associate Project Engineer, Assistant Project Engineer, and Sr. Project Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications range from a Diploma in Engineering or B.Sc. to a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 49,000 per month, varying for each post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online interview, and the final selection will be based on the candidate's performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Assam, Pin code: 781039.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
